query:
confirming these are the correct changes for this design: Changes applied across all 7 artifacts:                                                                            
                                                                                                                     
  Change 1 — Tick writes no Contradicts:                                    
  - write_inferred_edges_with_cap is Supports-only, no contradiction_threshold parameter                             
  - AC-10 replaced with AC-10a: any Contradicts write in nli_detection_tick.rs is a gate-blocking defect
  - R-01 downgraded from Critical → eliminated by design. Risk count: 2 Critical (down from 3)                       
                                                                                                                     
  Change 2 — R-02 ordering explicit:                                                                                 
  - AC-06c now reads: cap source candidates to max_graph_inference_per_tick during select_source_candidates (Phase 3,
   metadata-only), then call get_embedding in Phase 4 only for the already-capped list. Order: cap first, then fetch.
                                                                                                                     
  Change 3 — R-09 named everywhere:                                                                                  
  - ARCHITECTURE.md: named constraint in rayon dispatch section with full prohibition list (no .await, no 
  Handle::current(), no tokio::) and grep commands                                                                   
  - SPECIFICATION.md: constraint C-14 added       
  - RISK-TEST-STRATEGY.md: R-09 fully rewritten with detection method + 4 test scenarios + independent validator     
  requirement                                                                                                   
  - IMPLEMENTATION-BRIEF.md: pre-merge Gate 7 added (grep command + independent review requirement)                  
  - ACCEPTANCE-MAP.md: AC-R09 row added                                                            
                                                                                                                     
  Unimatrix housekeeping: Entry #3593 deprecated (wrong pool ADR).

entries.title: ADR-002 crt-029: write_inferred_edges_with_cap as Named Variant, Not Reuse of write_edges_with_cap
Tick passes over full entry set: bound, shuffle, and embedding-filter source candidates independently of NLI pair cap
Graph inference edge stall: supports_edge_threshold too conservative for retrospective-dominated corpus
ADR crt-037 (replacement): Independent per-type budgets in nli_detection_tick Phase 5
